```{r Validation rule 23: invalid ICHI first side procedure code}
if (all(c("procedure_description", "side_procedure_code_1") %in% colnames(data$surgeryData)))
  problems <- problems |>
    dplyr::bind_rows(
      data$events |>
        dplyr::filter(.data$event_type_key == "pro") |>
        dplyr::select("patient_key", "enrollment_key", "event_key") |>
        dplyr::inner_join(
          data$surgeryData |>
            dplyr::select("event_key", "procedure_description", "procedure_code" = "side_procedure_code_1"),
          dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
        dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data$procedure_code) & !neoipcr::is_valid_ichi_code(.data$procedure_code)) |>
        dplyr::anti_join(
          exceptions |> dplyr::filter(.data$rule_id == 23L),
          dplyr::join_by("event_key")) |>
        tidyr::nest(context = c("procedure_description", "procedure_code")) |>
        dplyr::mutate(
          rule_id        = 23L,
          patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
          enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
          event_key      = .data$event_key,
          context        = .data$context,
          .keep = "none"))
```
